calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Continued To Aug-10-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted; Mrmorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Capital One, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Defendant Jaime J Sahagun did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's Request For Admissions. Set One. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement attaches when no responses have been provided.

Plaintiff Capital One, N.A.'s RFAs, Set One are deemed admitted.

To the extent Plaintiff's reference to Code of Civil Procedure section 2023.010 is a request for additional sanctions, the request is denied.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2026 Set For Trial On Jun-15-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
